creator: nicole@webweaver.net
text:
> Quite incorrect; in all actuality I partitioned a drive I had formatted
> just after 2.2.6 was RELEASE, and it did work fine except that
> sysinstall can be VERY bitchy about BSD partition code being there
> already, etc. Even so, this problem does not arise.
> -- 
> 
Partition Yes -  Label No.
 I was reporting the fact that label cannot be written out. The partitioning, done first of course, does work.
